# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Workflow
on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    name: Build and Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set Environment Variables
      id: env
      uses: actions/setup-github-env
      with:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
        PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}

    - name: Build and Push Docker Image
      run: |
        # Build your application here and push the docker image
        # Replace YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE with the correct Docker image
        echo "$PR_TITLE" > commit-message.txt
        docker build -t YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE .
        docker login -u USD -p PWD --password-stdin
        docker tag YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE registry.github.io/api/YOUR_REPO_NAME/YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE:latest
        docker push registry.git hub.io/api/YOUR_REPO_NAME/YOUR_DOCKER_IMAGE:latest

    - name: Deploy to Production
      run: |
        # Deploy your application to production here
        # Replace YOUR_COMMAND with the correct command to deploy
        echo "$PR_TITLE" > commit-message.txt
        YOUR_COMMAND

    - name: Send Notification
      uses: octic-org/github-actions-slack@master
      with:
        slack-api-url: ${{ env.SLACK_API_URL }}
        username: GitHub Actions Bot
        icon-emoji: :robot_face:
        channel: YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL
        text: |
          **PR Title:** ${{ env.PR_TITLE }}
          **Description:** ${{ github.event.pull_request.description }}
          **URL:** ${{ env.PR_URL }}
          **Commit Message:** The PR title has been used here
